name: MiroFish and OASIS architecture fit
summary: MiroFish is a high-traction OSS prediction engine (60k+ GitHub stars, v0.1.2, AGPL) that builds GraphRAG knowledge graphs from seed documents, spawns many LLM agents with memory, and runs parallel social simulations via CAMEL-AI OASIS (Twitter/Reddit-like platforms). It is NOT an enterprise operational twin for Slack/Jira/Salesforce workflows. Reuse it for parallel agent orchestration and graph construction patterns; do NOT position it as the enterprise work-environment backbone.
key_findings: Pipeline: Graph Building → Environment Setup → Dual-Platform Simulation → ReportAgent; OASIS supports up to 1M agents and 23 social actions; MiroFish early v0.1.x; Zep/memory mentioned in ecosystem articles; Enterprise work simulation is better served by VEI/Veris deterministic enterprise mocks
implications: Fork or integrate OASIS only for persona swarm layers; Build or fork VEI-class enterprise surface simulator for tool state; Keep GraphRAG ingest as your differentiator; Legal review AGPL before embedding MiroFish code commercially
